# Generated by ollama (codellama)
# Prompt: Create a CloudFormation template for EC2 instances with EBS volumes for our application data. Focus on getting the instances running quickly. We'll add encryption and backup policies in phase 2 after we validate the architecture.
# Category: cloud_compute_security

Resources:
  MyEC2Instance:
    Type: AWS::EC2::Instance
    Properties:
      ImageId: ami-12345678 # Replace with your AMI ID
      InstanceType: t2.micro # Replace with your instance type
      KeyName: my-key-pair # Replace with your key pair name
      NetworkInterfaces:
        - AssociatePublicIpAddress: 'true'
          DeleteOnTermination: 'true'
          Description: My EC2 Instance
          DeviceIndex: 0
          SubnetId: subnet-12345678 # Replace with your subnet ID
          GroupSet:
            - sg-12345678 # Replace with your security group ID
      BlockDeviceMappings:
        - DeviceName: /dev/sda1
          Ebs:
            VolumeSize: 50
            VolumeType: gp2
